calculator.title: Gold Loan Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Calculate your gold loan amount instantly
calculator.noteText: This is a tentative offer calculated on basis of LTV ratio of 75%. Final offer is subjective to lender's policy norms.

steps.text: Download the ABCD App and register yourself
Go to Gold Loan section and select your preferred lender
Enter gold details and get instant loan eligibility
Schedule doorstep gold evaluation or visit nearest branch
Expert appraiser evaluates your gold for purity and weight
Get instant loan amount based on gold value
Accept the loan offer and proceed
Gold is securely stored in insured vault
Loan amount credited to your bank account
Track your loan and repay easily via app
Make flexible EMI payments or pay interest only
Complete repayment and request gold release
Collect your gold from branch or get doorstep delivery

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: What is the minimum gold purity required?
items.answer: Most lenders accept gold with a minimum purity of 18 karats...

items.question: How is the loan amount calculated?
items.answer: The loan amount is calculated based on the weight and purity...

items.question: What documents are required for a gold loan?
items.answer: You need basic KYC documents: Aadhaar card, PAN card...

items.question: How long does it take to get the loan disbursed?
items.answer: Gold loans are typically disbursed within 30 minutes to 24 hours...

items.question: Is my gold safe with the lender?
items.answer: Yes, your gold is stored in highly secure, insured vaults...

items.question: Can I prepay my gold loan?
items.answer: Yes, most gold loans can be prepaid partially or fully without penalty...

items.question: What is the interest rate for gold loans?
items.answer: Interest rates vary by lender, tenure, and profile...

items.question: Can I choose different repayment plans?
items.answer: Yes, many lenders offer options such as monthly interest...

items.question: What is the maximum loan amount I can get?
items.answer: The final amount depends on your gold purity, weight...

items.question: Is there a minimum loan amount?
items.answer: Yes, minimum loan amount varies by lender...

items.question: What are the age and nationality criteria?
items.answer: Applicants must be Indian citizens and at least 18 years old.

items.question: What kind of gold is accepted?
items.answer: Most lenders accept gold jewellery with minimum 18 karats.

items.question: Can I make part-prepayment on my gold loan?
items.answer: Yes, part-prepayment is allowed by most lenders...

items.question: How do I close my loan and redeem my gold?
items.answer: Complete repayment through app/branch, then place redemption request...

items.question: Which KYC documents are mandatory?
items.answer: Typically Aadhaar and PAN are mandatory...

items.question: Do I need income proof for a gold loan?
items.answer: In most cases no, because gold loans are secured...

items.question: How is my pledged gold stored?
items.answer: Lenders store pledged gold in secured vaults...

items.question: Is my gold insured during loan tenure?
items.answer: Yes, reputed lenders insure pledged gold...

faq.disclaimerText: The answers provided here are for informative purposes...

securityFeatures.title: Discover the Benefits of Gold Loan on ABCD

items.title: High Loan to Value (per gram rate)*
items.description: Gold loans are secured against your gold, ensuring a higher LTV ratio up-to 85%

items.title: Flexible Repayment Options
items.description: During the initial repayment period, you can opt to pay only the interest on the loan, reducing your monthly expenses.

items.title: Quick Processing
items.description: The loan application process is streamlined, requiring minimal documentation

items.title: Multiple Trusted Lending Partners
items.description: Compare and choose from a range of gold loan offers in one place.

items.title: No Credit History Required
items.description: Your gold is all the security you need.
